message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 35
  BoxPadding 10
  MessageAlign left
}

actor User
participant JobManager
participant Nodes
participant ESDM
participant "Post Processing Library" as PPL
database Storage

User -> JobManager : submit job(IN, OUT)
JobManager -> Nodes

== Initialization ==
Nodes -> Storage : read IN=x
Storage --> Nodes : return

== Loop ==
loop
  Nodes -> Nodes : compute
  Nodes -> ESDM : write async OUT=y
  activate ESDM
  ESDM -> Storage : write snapshot (async)
  ESDM -> PPL : trigger post processing if region effected

  == In Situ Post Processing ==
  activate PPL
  PPL -> PPL : perform post processing
  PPL -> Storage : (could write result directly)
  PPL --> ESDM : return
  deactivate PPL

  ESDM -> Storage : write post processing result
  deactivate ESDM
  ESDM --> Nodes : return
end

note left of User
OUT files become visible
end note

note over ESDM
multiple iterations
end note

== Finalize ==

note left of User
All OUT files become visible to subsequent users.
end note

@enduml
